---
title: "CheckM"
author: "Dhevin Fernando"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Checkm

cd to my top level for the project
```bash
cd ~/marine-genomics
```
make and change to a checkm directory
```bash
mkdir checkm
cd checkm
```
to identify the longest contig in the assembly we run the following command which orders them from shortest to longest:
```bash
cat ../flye/bbd/assembly.fasta | bioawk -c fastx '{print length($seq),$name}' | sort -n
```

now we manually add the largest contig to checkm
```bash
mkdir bins_bbd
cp ../metabat/bins_bbd/*.fa bins_bbd/
samtools faidx ../flye/bbd/assembly.fasta contig_XX > bins_bbd/contig_XX.fa
```

we then create a new shell slurm script with the following code (run_checkm_bbd.sh) and run it to submit a checkm job:
```bash
#!/bin/bash
#SBATCH --time=60
#SBATCH --ntasks=6 --mem=10gb

echo "Starting checkm in $(pwd) at $(date)"

shopt -s expand_aliases
alias checkm='apptainer run -B /pvol/:/pvol /pvol/data/sif/checkm.sif checkm'

checkm lineage_wf bins_bbd out -t 4 -x fa -f checkm_results_bbd.txt

echo "Finished checkm in $(pwd) at $(date)"
```

the job is then submitted with the following command
```bash
sbatch run_checkm_bbd.sh
```
